calendar.matters:
MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT SUMRAN CHOMMANARD'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND is Granted. (CCP sec. 473.5.) Defendant has established that he did not have actual notice of the suit and his lack of actual notice was not caused by his inexcusable neglect or avoidance of service. (Declaration of Sumran Chommanard.) "It is the policy of the law to favor, wherever possible, a hearing on the merits." (Weitz v. Yankosky (1966) 63 Cal.2d 849, 854.) Defendant may file his proposed answer within 10 days of entry of this order. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 =302/ehg

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2013 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Mars Goodman and Shawna Van Tree, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Timothy J. Kodani, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, William E. Wilson,
Plaintiff William E. Wilson Sworn and examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Sumran Chommanard,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

It is hereby ordered and adjudged that a money judgment in favor of Plaintiff shall be entered as follows:

1. For Plaintiff William E. Wilson against Defendant Sumran Chommanard for compensatory damages for Economic Damages for healthcare expenses in the sum of $410,688.00.
2. For Plaintiff William E. Wilson against Defendant Sumran Chommanard for compensatory damages for Non-economic Damages for pain and suffering in the sum of $2,000,000.00.
3. Attorney fees and costs incurred by Plaintiff shall be borne by the Plaintiff.
4. The total judgment in favor of Plaintiff William E. Wilson and against Defendant Sumran Chommanard is $2,410,688.00 and shall bear interest at the legal rate per annum.

It is so ordered.
Judgment signed in open court.
